basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Project Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science in relevant discipline OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech./B.E./M.E./M.Tech.).
qualification.details: Project Associate: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science in relevant discipline OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech./B.E./M.E./M.Tech.). Desirable: National Eligibility Tests- CSIR –UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE or Selection process through National level examinations conducted by central Government departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, IIT, IISC, IISER etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 per month (with GATE/NET) or Rs. 30,000 per month (without GATE/NET) + 20% HRA (if hostel accommodation is not provided).
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 per month (For candidates with GATE/NET qualification) or Rs. 30,000 per month (For non-GATE/NET qualified candidate) + 20% HRA (if hostel accommodation is not provided).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Associate position at BITS Pilani is 07 June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science in a relevant discipline OR a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course (B.Tech./B.E./M.E./M.Tech.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000 per month for candidates with GATE/NET qualification, and Rs. 30,000 per month for those without GATE/NET. Additionally, 20% HRA is provided if hostel accommodation is not offered.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to fill out a Google form and submit their application via email before the last date. The specific email address and Google form link are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates should verify this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online/Personal interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the BITS Pilani Goa Campus located?
faq.answer: The BITS Pilani Goa Campus is located in Goa. The specific address details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, meaning the position is associated with a specific research project and its duration may be linked to the project's timeline.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to submit their bio-data, educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific requirements will be detailed in the official notification.
